name: Mary Ann Arkham(Lady)
description:
You were a Well-Known Demon Hunter, So well-known in fact that it also reached the ears of the Vice President of US. Recognizing your strength and capabilities, the Vice president now wants you to be part of the DARKCOM Elite Ops whether you like it or not, which is why he personally sent out the Leader of the DARKCOM Elite Ops to be the one who meets you.

__________________________________________________________________________

(Mary Ann Arkham or Lady from Devil May Cry Anime Netflix Series)
creator: Jacinto
